Cross-skill gaps

  • dev-flow-plan → tracking-import-cron
    via: tickets.tickets.external_id → bachelorprojekt.features (no ticket_id column today)
    dev-flow-plan sets a ticket external_id on the plan, but tracking-import-cron only ingests PR metadata — it never joins ticket IDs into bachelorprojekt.features.
  • brainstorming → tracking-import-cron
    via: .superpowers/brainstorm/*/state/events (filesystem only)
    Brainstorming session events stay in the local filesystem and are never ingested into any DB table, making session data invisible to all analytics queries.
  • bug-report-submit → tickets-admin-create
    via: bugs.bug_tickets vs tickets.tickets — two separate write paths
    A user-submitted bug (public.bug_tickets) and a triaged ticket (tickets.tickets) are written by different flows with no automatic promotion or linking between them.

Skills

Dev-Flow Skills

brainstorming skill

Explores user intent and design alternatives before any implementation.

out (files): .superpowers/brainstorm/*/state/events

workflow-to-db Session events are written to the local filesystem only — never ingested into any DB table.

writing-plans skill

Turns a spec into a committed, task-structured implementation plan.

out (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

in (files): docs/superpowers/specs/*.md

using-git-worktrees

Sets up an isolated git worktree so parallel features don't collide.

dev-flow-plan skill

Orchestrates path-choice, worktree setup, brainstorming, spec and plan, then creates a ticket.

out (tables): tickets.tickets, tickets.ticket_comments

out (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

in (tables): tickets.tickets

dev-flow-execute skill

Picks up a committed plan, implements it, opens a PR, merges, and archives the plan.

out (tables): tickets.tickets, tickets.ticket_comments, tickets.ticket_links, tickets.ticket_plans, bachelorprojekt.features

in (tables): tickets.tickets

in (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

workflow-to-db ticket_plans table archived only on merge — in-flight execution state is invisible to the DB.

plan-context.sh

Reads active plan frontmatter and injects it into sub-agent prompts.

in (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

plan-frontmatter-hook.sh

Adds required frontmatter (domains, status) to newly created plan files.

out (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

in (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

TDD skill

Enforces red → green → refactor discipline before any feature code is written.

out (tables): public.test_runs, public.test_results

Sub-Agents

bachelorprojekt-db

Sub-agent for PostgreSQL schema changes, queries, and backup/restore.

out (tables): tickets.tickets, tickets.ticket_comments

in (tables): bachelorprojekt.features, tickets.tickets

bachelorprojekt-infra

Sub-agent for Kubernetes manifest work, Kustomize overlays, and Taskfile deploy tasks.

out (files): k3d/**/*.yaml, prod*/**/*.yaml

in (files): k3d/**/*.yaml, Taskfile.yml

bachelorprojekt-ops

Sub-agent for live cluster operations: pod status, logs, restarts.

in (tables): tickets.tickets

bachelorprojekt-website

Sub-agent for Astro/Svelte frontend and /api/* backend endpoints.

out (tables): public.site_settings, public.assistant_conversations

in (tables): bachelorprojekt.features, public.web_sessions

bachelorprojekt-test

Sub-agent for writing, running, and debugging BATS and Playwright tests.

out (tables): public.test_runs, public.test_results, public.playwright_reports

in (tables): tickets.tickets

bachelorprojekt-security

Sub-agent for SealedSecrets, Keycloak realm config, and OIDC setup.

out (files): environments/sealed-secrets/*.yaml

in (files): environments/.secrets/*.yaml

CI/CD Pipeline

track-pr.yml

GitHub Action: writes a tracking JSON for every merged PR.

out (files): tracking/pending/*.json

track-plans.yml

GitHub Action: updates plan frontmatter status on merge.

out (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

in (files): docs/superpowers/plans/*.md

tracking-import CronJob

In-cluster CronJob: drains tracking/pending/*.json into bachelorprojekt.features every 5 minutes.

out (tables): bachelorprojekt.features

in (files): tracking/pending/*.json

build-website.yml

GitHub Action: builds and rolls the Astro website on website/** push to main.

in (files): website/src/**, website/public/**

dev-auto-deploy.yml

GitHub Action: auto-deploys to dev.mentolder.de on relevant push.

in (files): k3d/**, website/**, brett/**

task feature:* deploy

Manual Taskfile deploy: task feature:deploy, task feature:website, task feature:brett, etc. fan out across both prod clusters (mentolder + korczewski) after merge.

in (files): k3d/**/*.yaml, prod-mentolder/**, prod-korczewski/**

App Workflows

Keycloak SSO login

User authenticates via Keycloak OIDC; session token issued to downstream services.

out (tables): public.web_sessions

db-fk web_sessions.user_id is a plain UUID referencing the Keycloak realm — no FK to a local users table.

Nextcloud Talk meeting

Users join a Talk video room; chat and recording metadata are stored by Nextcloud.

in (tables): public.web_sessions

workflow-to-db Talk meeting events are stored in Nextcloud's own MariaDB — not in shared-db.

Website chat message

User sends a real-time message via the Astro website SSE channel.

out (tables): public.messages, public.chat_messages

in (tables): public.web_sessions, public.chat_rooms

Tickets admin create

Platform admin creates a ticket via the admin web UI.

out (tables): tickets.tickets, tickets.ticket_activity, tickets.ticket_comments

in (tables): tickets.tickets

Bug report submit

User submits a bug report; stored in bugs.bug_tickets.

out (tables): public.bug_tickets

cross-skill bugs.bug_tickets and tickets.tickets are separate write paths — no automatic promotion from a user bug report to a triaged ticket.

coaching:ingest task

Ingests a PDF/EPUB into pgvector and coaching.books.

out (tables): public.questionnaire_templates

in (files): *.pdf, *.epub

workflow-to-db pgvector embeddings land in a separate vector DB collection — the schema mapping is external to shared-db.

Arena gameplay

Player joins an arena game; lobby and match state persisted by arena-server.

out (tables): public.web_sessions

in (tables): public.web_sessions

workflow-to-db Arena match state is held in-memory by arena-server and never written to shared-db.

Brett snapshot save

User saves a systemic constellation board; stored as brett_snapshots.

out (tables): public.brett_snapshots, public.brett_rooms

in (tables): public.brett_rooms, public.web_sessions

Coverage

17/103 documented tables have at least one declared writer.

32 columns flagged by the unbound-FK heuristic.

3 declared cross-skill gaps.
